ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizing_data" (
  "sizing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sizing entry */,
  "general_size" TEXT /* General size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "us_clothing_size" TEXT /* US clothing size (e.g., 0, 24, 68, 1012, 1416) */,
  "denim_size" TEXT /* Denim size (e.g., 2425, 2627, 2829, 30-3132, 3334) */,
  "actual_waist_measurement" TEXT /* Actual waist measurement in inches (e.g., 23.524.25, 2526, 2728, 2930.5, 3233) */,
  "actual_hip_measurement" TEXT /* Actual hip measurement in inches (e.g., 33.534.25, 3536, 3738, 3940.5, 4243) */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  "european_clothing_size" TEXT /* European clothing size (e.g., 34, 36, 38) */,
  "uk_clothing_size" TEXT /* UK clothing size (e.g., 6, 8, 10) */,
  "chest_measurement" TEXT /* Actual chest measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Actual sleeve length in inches */,
  "inseam_length" TEXT /* Actual inseam length in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sizing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing category */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the price */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "available_colors" TEXT /* List of available colors */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "care_instructions" TEXT /* Care instructions for the product */,
  "features" TEXT /* Additional features of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizing" (
  "product_sizing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product sizing entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "sizing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sizing data */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the product in this size */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to stock quantity */,
  "is_out_of_stock" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the size is out of stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_sizing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the store */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the store */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the store */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the store location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the store location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "sizing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sizing data */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the product in this size at the store */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to inventory */,
  "is_low_stock" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the stock is low */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "reward_points" INTEGER /* Reward points accumulated by the customer */,
  "preferred_currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency for the customer */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "waist_measurement" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hip_measurement" REAL /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "chest_measurement" REAL /* Chest measurement in inches */,
  "inseam_length" REAL /* Inseam length in inches */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Shoulder width in inches */,
  "neck_measurement" REAL /* Neck measurement in inches */,
  "arm_length" REAL /* Arm length in inches */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to measurements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the total amount */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "sizing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sizing data */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in this size */,
  "price_per_item" REAL /* Price per item */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the price per item */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax applied to the item */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., store manager, customer service representative, data analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
